do_not_merge.reason: Contradiction test (test 1) fails: route_id differs (Q20A vs Q20B), distinct base routes. No merge allowed despite shared corridor or label bundling.
Contradiction test (test 1) fails: route_id differs (Q20A vs Q44), distinct base routes. No merge allowed despite shared corridor or label bundling.
Contradiction test (test 1) fails: route_id differs (Q20B vs Q44), distinct base routes. No merge allowed despite shared corridor or label bundling.

suggestion.rationale: All three records have different route_id (Q20A, Q20B, Q44) which is a strong identity field. Per the Identity Merge Canon contradiction test, any difference in strong identity field forces do_not_merge. The candidate edges are false positives caused by a faulty shared_base_route:Q20A signal that does not reflect the actual route IDs. The Q20A record's bundling of 'Q20A/B' in labels does not override its canonical route_id. No merges are possible.
